blocked.mamba_encoder: mamba_ssm is unavailable in the verified base conda environment; installation was not completed to avoid changing torch/CUDA dependencies.

final_model_selection.shared_model_structure: same SSP-TGFM model config across all final datasets
final_model_selection.test_usage: not used for model or hyperparameter selection

global_model_selection.shared_model: same model config across all datasets
global_model_selection.train_selection: dataset-specific train hyperparameters selected on validation only

leakage_control.history_for_test: train+validation edges only, further restricted causally per query batch
leakage_control.history_for_train_batch: edges with time strictly before batch min time
leakage_control.history_for_val: train edges only, further restricted causally per query batch
